instruction: Six symbol icons: check, plus, x-mark, minus, check, plus. Recolor ONLY the x-mark in slot 3 (slot-3-x-mark) red (#e63946). All other icons stay at #222.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 280 72" width="280" height="72">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="280" height="72" fill="white" />
  <g id="slot-1-check" data-source="heroicons/outline/check.svg" transform="translate(12, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m4.5 12.75 6 6 9-13.5"/></g>
  <g id="slot-2-plus" data-source="heroicons/outline/plus.svg" transform="translate(56, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15"/></g>
  <g id="slot-3-x-mark" data-source="heroicons/outline/x-mark.svg" transform="translate(100, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"/></g>
  <g id="slot-4-minus" data-source="heroicons/outline/minus.svg" transform="translate(144, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M5 12h14"/></g>
  <g id="slot-5-check" data-source="heroicons/outline/check.svg" transform="translate(188, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m4.5 12.75 6 6 9-13.5"/></g>
  <g id="slot-6-plus" data-source="heroicons/outline/plus.svg" transform="translate(232, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
